user.title: Claude Usage — Setup
user.description: Enter your Claude.ai session credentials. You can find them in your browser DevTools (F12 → Application → Cookies → claude.ai).

data.org_id: Organization ID (UUID from the API URL)

data_description.session_key: Value of the 'sessionKey' cookie on claude.ai
data_description.cf_clearance: Value of the 'cf_clearance' cookie on claude.ai
data_description.org_id: UUID visible in the Network tab: /api/organizations/<uuid>/usage

reauth_confirm.title: Claude Usage — Re-authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired (org: {org_id}). Please paste fresh cookies from your browser.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Claude.ai. Check your network.
error.session_expired: Session expired. Paste a fresh sessionKey from your browser.
error.cf_clearance_expired: Cloudflare token expired. Paste a fresh cf_clearance from your browser.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

data_description.update_interval: How often the integration fetches data from Claude.ai (min: 10 s, max: 6 h).
